keyFeatures.en: Free for low-resolution images and personal use
keyFeatures.zh: 免费提供低分辨率图片和个人使用

description.en: 100% FREE to use for low-resolution images and personal uses. No sign-up required.
description.zh: 免费提供低分辨率图片和个人使用，无需注册。

description.en: Unlimited use for a one-time payment. No monthly fees.
description.zh: 一次性支付，终身使用，无月费。

description.en: High-volume usage for businesses. Custom pricing available.
description.zh: 面向企业的高流量使用，提供定制价格。

weaknesses.en: Limited to low-resolution images and personal use in the free tier, which may not meet the needs of businesses or high-volume users.
weaknesses.zh: 免费套餐仅限低分辨率图片和个人使用，可能无法满足企业和高流量用户的需求。

targetAudience.en: Individuals and small businesses who need to remove image backgrounds for personal or low-volume commercial use.
targetAudience.zh: 需要去除图片背景的个人和小型企业，用于个人或低流量商业用途。

positioning.en: Removal.AI positions itself as a free and easy-to-use tool for removing image backgrounds, with paid plans for businesses and high-volume users.
positioning.zh: Removal.AI 定位为一个免费且易于使用的去除图片背景工具，提供付费计划供企业和高流量用户使用。
